name: testRowsPerPageDropdownOptions
description: Verify the default 'Rows Per Page' value is 25 and the dropdown contains the correct options.
descriptionHtml: Verify the default 'Rows Per Page' value is 25 and the dropdown contains the correct options.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify the default 'Rows Per Page' value is 25 and the dropdown contains the correct options.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: The default 'Rows Per Page' value is set to 25
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify: The dropdown contains all four options: 10, 25, 50, 100
